rulings.Case Title: RED BRIDGE PARTNERS, LLC VS. NOLAN LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 15, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS NOLAN LEE AND MAY LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Hearing Required. Moving party's counsel is ordered to prepare and submit to the Court a declaration under penalty of perjury with true and correct copies of (1) executed retainer agreement for Red Bridge Partners v. Lee; (2) retainer payment; and (3) executed retainer agreement for Lee v. Lee. This declaration with un-redacted documents should not be filed and should be presented for in camera review by 9:00 a.m. Moving party should also prepare a copy of such declaration with redacted copies of the described above documents. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL WILEY, TRUSTEE OF THE WILEY FAMILY TRUST VS. ADAM BRISTOL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Bristol, Viskontas, And Burke'S Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 15, 2013, line 5. Defendants Bristol, Viskontas, And Burke'S Special Motion To Strike DENIED. Marlin v. Aimco Venezia, LLC (2007) 154 Cal.App.4th 154. Whether plaintiff's complaint states a valid cause of action (versus remedy) is not a proper issue to be addressed by a motion to strike, especially where the first prong of CCP 425.16 is not met. = (501/REQ)
